green_dew_herb.name: Green Dew Herb
green_dew_herb.description: A moist herb gathered from bamboo groves.

bamboo_resin.name: Bamboo Resin
bamboo_resin.description: Sticky resin used as a pill stabilizer.

minor_beast_core.name: Minor Beast Core
minor_beast_core.description: A faint core from low-level spirit beasts.

ember_moss.name: Ember Moss
ember_moss.description: Moss that smolders with residual fire qi.

spirit_iron_shard.name: Spirit Iron Shard
spirit_iron_shard.description: A shard of ore infused with spirit energy.

bandit_token.name: Bandit Token
bandit_token.description: A crude token taken from cliff bandits.

moonlotus.name: Moonlotus
moonlotus.description: A pale flower that blooms only under moonlight.

ancient_dust.name: Ancient Dust
ancient_dust.description: Dust from collapsed ruins, heavy with old qi.

refined_beast_core.name: Refined Beast Core
refined_beast_core.description: A purified core from stronger beasts.

blackwind_key.name: Blackwind Key
blackwind_key.description: Opens the gate to Blackwind Cavern.

affix_stone.name: Affix Stone
affix_stone.description: Can imprint an affix onto equipment.

qi_gathering_pill.name: Qi Gathering Pill
qi_gathering_pill.description: Boosts qi gain from cultivation for a short time.

tempering_pill.name: Tempering Pill
tempering_pill.description: Hardens the body for one adventure or dungeon run.

clarity_pill.name: Clarity Pill
clarity_pill.description: Steadies the mind for breakthrough attempts.

blood_ember_pill.name: Blood Ember Pill
blood_ember_pill.description: Burns with aggressive qi for dungeon combat.

moonwell_tonic.name: Moonwell Tonic
moonwell_tonic.description: Attunes you to rare events in solo adventures.

root_reforging_pill.name: Root Reforging Pill
root_reforging_pill.description: Rare alchemy that reshapes your spirit root.

flow_pill.name: Flow Meridian Pill
flow_pill.description: Opens the meridians for swifter travel — shaves time off your next adventure.

meridian_surge_pill.name: Meridian Surge Pill
meridian_surge_pill.description: Surges qi circulation so your next cultivations return sooner.

gatebreaker_dust.name: Gatebreaker Dust
gatebreaker_dust.description: Grinds dungeon seals — your next dungeon run ignores much of the gate cooldown.

void_pulse_pill.name: Void Pulse Pill
void_pulse_pill.description: A single pulse through every meridian — all major cooldowns shorten for one use each.

spirit_blade.name: Spirit Blade
spirit_blade.description: A forged weapon humming with beast qi.

mistwoven_vest.name: Mistwoven Vest
mistwoven_vest.description: Resin-hardened armor woven from grove materials.

bandit_talisman.name: Bandit's Talisman
bandit_talisman.description: A charm of stolen luck from cliff bandits.

moonwell_pendant.name: Moonwell Pendant
moonwell_pendant.description: Lotus and ancient dust sealed in a spirit focus.

manual_swift_slash.name: Manual: Swift Slash
manual_swift_slash.description: Teaches the Swift Slash sword technique.

manual_ember_palm.name: Manual: Ember Palm
manual_ember_palm.description: Teaches the Ember Palm fire technique.

manual_iron_cleave.name: Manual: Iron Cleave
manual_iron_cleave.description: Teaches the Iron Cleave sword technique.

manual_flame_burst.name: Manual: Flame Burst
manual_flame_burst.description: Teaches the Flame Burst fire technique.

manual_iron_body.name: Manual: Iron Body Blow
manual_iron_body.description: Teaches the Iron Body Blow technique.

manual_meridian_strike.name: Manual: Meridian Strike
manual_meridian_strike.description: Teaches the Meridian Strike body technique.

manual_void_pulse.name: Manual: Void Pulse
manual_void_pulse.description: Teaches the Void Pulse soul technique.

manual_qi_barrier.name: Manual: Qi Barrier
manual_qi_barrier.description: Teaches the Qi Barrier utility technique.

manual_mist_step.name: Manual: Mist Step
manual_mist_step.description: Teaches the Mist Step utility technique.

manual_blood_feast.name: Manual: Blood Feast
manual_blood_feast.description: Teaches the Blood Feast passive technique.

manual_ember_heart.name: Manual: Ember Heart
manual_ember_heart.description: Teaches the Ember Heart passive technique.

manual_keen_focus.name: Manual: Keen Focus
manual_keen_focus.description: Teaches the Keen Focus passive technique.

manual_sanguine_drain.name: Manual: Sanguine Drain
manual_sanguine_drain.description: Teaches the Sanguine Drain sword technique.

manual_rending_flurry.name: Manual: Rending Flurry
manual_rending_flurry.description: Teaches the Rending Flurry sword technique.

manual_cinder_lance.name: Manual: Cinder Lance
manual_cinder_lance.description: Teaches the Cinder Lance fire technique.

manual_mountain_guard.name: Manual: Mountain Guard
manual_mountain_guard.description: Teaches the Mountain Guard body technique.

manual_soul_siphon.name: Manual: Soul Siphon
manual_soul_siphon.description: Teaches the Soul Siphon soul technique.

manual_purifying_breath.name: Manual: Purifying Breath
manual_purifying_breath.description: Teaches the Purifying Breath utility technique.

technique_fragment.name: Technique Fragment
technique_fragment.description: Imprinted qi from a fallen art. You need 3 fragments + 1 Blank Scroll + 1 Spirit Ink to bind a random manual with /craft manual. Buy blank scrolls at /shop; farm ink from /gather.

blank_scroll.name: Blank Scroll
blank_scroll.description: Unmarked parchment for inscribing techniques. Required for /craft manual (with 3 fragments and spirit ink). Buy at /shop or gather from Bamboo Grove, Mistwood Village, and Moonwell Ruins.

spirit_ink.name: Spirit Ink
spirit_ink.description: Ink that holds qi script without fading. Required for /craft manual. Gather from Bamboo Grove or Ashen Cliff Pass.

script_shard.name: Script Shard
script_shard.description: A shard of ancient inscription from ruined sect vaults.

village_herb.name: Village Herb
village_herb.description: Common herbs traded in Mistwood Village markets.

pine_resin.name: Pine Resin
pine_resin.description: Thick resin harvested from ancient pines in the Verdant Depths.

swamp_moss.name: Swamp Moss
swamp_moss.description: Qi-soaked moss from the Cursed Swamp's black waters.

bog_iron.name: Bog Iron
bog_iron.description: Ore pulled from sunken paths in the Cursed Swamp.

hollow_pearl.name: Hollow Pearl
hollow_pearl.description: A pearl formed around corrupt qi — prized by swamp hunters.
